creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
If you make a new installation, make sure you follow the installation docu:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/blob/master/install/12.9-freebsd.md

If you make an update, make sure you follow the upgrade manual, for minor:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/blob/master/update/freebsd_patch_versions.md

For major upgrade, choose the one matching your upgrade:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/tree/master/update
